moves.name: Stand LP
moves.notes: Cannot link or chain into any other move (mostly used to cancel into specials) | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MP
moves.notes: Good poke tool with strong hitbox priority

moves.name: Stand HP
moves.notes: Mostly a combo tool (hitboxes not ideal for poking or anti-airing) | Forces stand

moves.name: Stand LK
moves.notes: Blanka's fastest normal at 4F | Chains into stand LK / crouch LP / crouch LK

moves.name: Stand MK
moves.notes: +3F extra recovery frames (20F) on whiff

moves.name: Stand HK
moves.notes: Forces stand | Combo tool as well as a solid anti-air on later active frames and also a good oki / meaty tool

moves.name: Crouch LP
moves.notes: Far range cancelable jab (furthest range of Blanka's light buttons) | Chains into stand LK / crouch LP / crouch LK

moves.name: Crouch MP
moves.notes: Very far range cancelable medium that's also a situational anti-air (but cannot hit cross-up) | Solid poke / buffer tool with very lenient cancel window making this very easy to hit confirm (19F hit confirm window)

moves.name: Crouch HP
moves.notes: Forces stand | Very far range poke that can also anti-air in specific situations

moves.name: Crouch LK
moves.notes: Chains into stand LK / crouch LP / crouch LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MK
moves.notes: Good frame advantage on hit for a cancelable crouch MK (can be used as a combo tool) | +2F extra recovery frames (18F) on whiff

moves.name: Crouch HK
moves.notes: Has some Juggle potential naturally without Drive Rush

moves.name: Jump LP
moves.notes: Decent air-to-air

moves.name: Jump MP
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state | Cancelable into airborne Blanka Ball

moves.name: Jump HP
moves.notes: Spikes down airborne opponents on hit

moves.name: Neutral Jump HP
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state

moves.name: Jump LK
moves.notes: Decent air-to-air

moves.name: Jump MK
moves.notes: Cross-up

moves.name: Jump HK
moves.notes: Blanka's main horizontal jump-in tool

moves.name: Rock Crusher
moves.notes: 2-hit Overhead | Carries over Counter-Hit / Punish Counter bonus frame advantage to both hits

moves.name: Double Knee Bombs
moves.notes: Forward moving 2-hit normal that low crushes on frames 9-23 | Forces stand on hit

moves.name: Wild Edge
moves.notes: No head hurtbox on frames 1-3 | Head hurtbox is invincible to airborne strikes on frames 4-14

moves.name: Wild Nail
moves.notes: +3F extra recovery frames (31F) on whiff or block | Low crushes on frames 10-20

moves.name: Amazon River Run
moves.notes: Far range slide that's Projectile invincible on the upper body and low profiles on frames 10-29 (does not evade projectiles low to the ground)

moves.name: Coward Crouch
moves.notes: Low profiles (and Upper Body Projectile invincible) starts on frame 9 and lasts until the final 18F of recovery (ranges from 9-29F or 9-130F depending on your actions) | If no input is made then Blanka stays down for 98F total (18F start + 52F crouch + 28F recovery)

moves.name: Wild Lift
moves.notes: Still retains the low profile hurtboxes and crouching status from Coward Crouch on first 3 start-up frames | Launches the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: Raid Jump
moves.notes: Upper body projectile invincible on frames 1-9 (frames 19-27 overall) | Airborne on frames 9-43 (frames 27-61 overall)

moves.name: Surprise Forward Hop
moves.notes: 3F more recovery (30F total) if done from Coward Crouch | Throw invincible on frames 12-22

moves.name: Surprise Back Hop
moves.notes: 3F more recovery (35F total) if done from Coward Crouch | Airborne on frames 11-21

moves.name: Wild Fang
moves.notes: Throw Loop (corner only): Walk forward (manually timed) / Dash up for +11 mixup / Surprise Hop forward for +3 mixup between throw/strike | Can still Surprise Hop forward and get a meaty strike on mid-screen back-rise

moves.name: Jungle Flip
moves.notes: Back Throw oki when cornered: Can dash up for a pseudo strike/throw loop or just Drive Rush in for a real strike/throw mix | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Wild Bites
moves.notes: Can Drive Rush for a meaty normal into tick throw against a cornered opponent | Gets +70% damage increase (2040 damage), HKD (denies back-roll option on wake-up), and depletes 1 bar of Drive Gauge on a Punish Counter

moves.name: Drive Impact: Wild Scratch
moves.notes: 2 hits of armor on frames 1-27 | Damages opponents Drive Gauge on Block (1/2 bar) | Hit (1 bar) | Counter-Hit (1.25 bar) | Punish Counter (1.5 bar)

moves.name: Drive Reversal: Quick Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-22 (frames 1-20 when used on wake-up as a Reversal) | Armor Break (blows through all armor like Drive Impact)

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: Parries all strikes and projectiles (high and low) from frame 1 | 12F parry window (can hold the parry to extend the parry window)

moves.name: Drive Rush
moves.notes: Dashes forward and enhances the next normal used out of the Drive Rush with +4 extra hitstun / blockstun (some moves also get unique properties enhanced such as juggle state) | The +4 bonus frame advantage gained from a Drive Rush enhanced move also stacks with any bonus frame advantage that move may have gained from Counter-Hit or Punish Counter

moves.name: Taunt
moves.notes: Back Taunt recharges +1 Blanka Chan Doll on frame 188 (233F total duration)

moves.name: Electric Thunder
moves.notes: Strike hitbox | +2F extra recovery frames (17F) on whiff

moves.name: OD Electric Thunder
moves.notes: Strike hitbox | Good + frames on block and launches the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: LP Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 10-23 (Forced Knockdown state) | Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 10F after leaving charge)

moves.name: MP Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 12-33 (Forced Knockdown state) | Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 10F after leaving charge)

moves.name: HP Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 20-43 (Forced Knockdown state) | Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 10F after leaving charge)

moves.name: OD Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 18-41 (Forced Knockdown state) | Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 10F after leaving charge)

moves.name: LK Vertical Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Trajectory: 45° degree up-forward | Invincible to airborne attacks on frames 8-26

moves.name: MK Vertical Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Trajectory: 65° degree up-forward | Invincible to airborne attacks on frames 8-26

moves.name: HK Vertical Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Trajectory: 90° degree straight up | Invincible to airborne attacks on frames 8-26

moves.name: OD Vertical Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Trajectory: 75° degree up-forward | Fully invincible on frames 1-10

moves.name: LK Backstep Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Can hit cross-up | Shortest trajectory; Can steer Blanka's air momentum forward or backwards (forward momentum is faster than backwards)

moves.name: MK Backstep Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Can hit cross-up | Medium trajectory; Can steer Blanka's air momentum forward or backwards (forward momentum is faster than backwards)

moves.name: HK Backstep Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Can hit cross-up | Farthest trajectory; Can steer Blanka's air momentum forward or backwards (forward momentum is faster than backwards)

moves.name: OD Backstep Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Cancelable into Level 2 and 3 Super on first hit | Can hit cross-up on the secondary hits (while airborne)

moves.name: Aerial Rolling Attack (air)
moves.notes: Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 10F after leaving charge) | Possible during any jump direction (even at the start of a forward jump) or after Coward Crouch > Raid Jump

moves.name: OD Aerial Rolling Attack (air)
moves.notes: Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 10F after leaving charge) | Possible during any jump direction (even at the start of a forward jump) or after Coward Crouch > Raid Jump

moves.name: LK Wild Hunt
moves.notes: Slow start-up command grab; Range: 2.50 (shortest) | Airborne on frames 9-26 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: MK Wild Hunt
moves.notes: Slow start-up command grab; Range: 3.41 (mid-range) | Airborne on frames 14-33 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: HK Wild Hunt
moves.notes: Slow start-up command grab; Range: 4.25 (furthest) | Airborne on frames 19-36 (Forced Knockdown state)

moves.name: OD Wild Hunt
moves.notes: Slow start-up command grab; Range: 2.70~3.59 | Can steer Blanka's air momentum forward or backwards (forward momentum is faster than backwards)

moves.name: Blanka-chan Bomb
moves.notes: Only one Blanka-chan doll can be on screen at a time | Blanka starts rounds with 3 Blanka-chan dolls stored up (the only way to restore them mid-match is doing Back+Taunt)

moves.name: Blanka-chan Bomb (Charge)
moves.notes: 1-hit Projectile hitbox | Projectile Speed: 0.04

moves.name: Blanka-chan Bomb (OD Charge)
moves.notes: 3-hit OD Projectile hitbox | Projectile Speed: 0.012 (bounce) / 0.05 (walk)

moves.name: Blanka-chan Bomb (SA1 Charge)
moves.notes: 5-hit Super Projectile hitbox | Projectile Speed: 0.1

moves.name: Shout of Earth
moves.notes: Strike and Throw invincible on frames 1-9 | Armor Break

moves.name: Lightning Beast
moves.notes: No form of invincibility whatsoever | Duration of 1500 frames (25 seconds) - The remaining timer freezes during any hitstop

moves.name: Ground Shave Cannonball
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-12 | Armor Break

moves.name: Ground Shave Cannonball (Critical Art)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-12 | Critical Art does +500 extra damage over regular version

moves.name: Rolling Cannon
moves.notes: 8-way directional airborne rolling attack | Not an Overhead

moves.name: Electric Thunder
moves.notes: Strike hitbox | +2F extra recovery frames (17F) on whiff

moves.name: OD Electric Thunder
moves.notes: Strike hitbox | Good + frames on block and launches the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.notes: Airborne on frames 10-23 (Forced Knockdown state) | Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 10F after leaving charge)

moves.notes: Airborne on frames 18-46 (Forced Knockdown state) | Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 10F after leaving charge)

moves.notes: Trajectory: 45° degree up-forward | Invincible to airborne attacks on frames 8-26

moves.notes: Trajectory: 65° degree up-forward | Invincible to airborne attacks on frames 8-26

moves.notes: Trajectory: 90° degree straight up | Invincible to airborne attacks on frames 8-26

moves.notes: Trajectory: 75° degree up-forward | Cannot cancel into Rolling Cannon on block

moves.notes: Can hit cross-up | Medium trajectory; Can steer Blanka's air momentum forward or backwards (forward momentum is faster than backwards)

moves.name: HK Backstep Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Can hit cross-up | Farthest trajectory; Can steer Blanka's air momentum forward or backwards (forward momentum is faster than backwards)

moves.name: OD Backstep Rolling Attack
moves.notes: Can hit cross-up | Can steer Blanka's air momentum forward or backwards (forward momentum is faster than backwards)

moves.notes: Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 10F after leaving charge) | No charge required if canceled into

moves.name: OD Aerial Rolling Attack (air)
moves.notes: Takes 40 frames to charge (holds charge for 10F after leaving charge) | No charge required if canceled into
